items.title: Global Insurer AIG Held At Bay For Now Despite A-Level Credit Rating
items.description: American International Group, Inc. stays Hold/Neutral: solid margins, balance sheet, dividend growth, and buybacks offset macro headwinds. Click for this AIG update.

items.title: Why The Narrative Around Travelers Companies (TRV) Is Shifting After Fresh Street And Valuation Updates
items.description: The latest update to Travelers Companies' fair value estimate edges the price target to roughly US$301.10 per share, even as the revenue growth assumption in the model shifts to a much more cautious 53.83% decline. That combination reflects how recent Street research is balancing confidence in the business with a tougher backdrop for pricing across parts of the P&C market. Stay tuned to see how you can keep track of these moving targets and monitor how the Travelers story evolves from...
